response.step_by_step_log: 1. Scanned video for vocal music. 2. Identified gameplay footage of a VTuber playing a dungeon crawler game. 3. VTuber provides commentary, including some rhythmic, improvised sing-song chanting, but no recognizable vocal track or official song is being performed.
response.global_summary: A gameplay clip of a VTuber navigating a dungeon in a Minecraft-like game, with continuous commentary and background instrumental game music.

scenes.description: VTuber navigates a copper-themed dungeon, fighting various enemies (pigs, zoglins) and looting chests. Instrumental background game music is playing throughout. No vocal performance.
